label: Transparent Hellebore motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Hellebore transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated hellebore bloom for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single winter-shade hellebore bloom with five dusty mauve cream petals, plum freckling near the center, soft green sepals and stem hints, pale cream stamens, accurate botanical form, crisp silhouette edges, and natural petal veining.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full bloom face at a slight editorial three-quarter angle, with a small curved green stem and no cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean diffused studio light that preserves dusty mauve, muted green, warm cream, deep plum, and winter-shade neutral detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no garden bed, no leaves as the main subject, no landscape, no decorative background, no second flower, no saturated pink, no generic rose, no tulip.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board derived from the provided hellebore bloom cutout for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme called "Morphous Hellebore".
Reference use: Use the visible hellebore cutout as the source of truth. Extract dusty mauve petals, plum freckles, muted green sepals/stem, warm cream stamens, winter-shade gray neutrals, subtle editorial rhythm, and soft botanical texture.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class composition, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Hellebore", motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Typography: readable English and Japanese examples; quiet editorial product UI with refined serif display accents and Noto Sans JP guidance.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style light product design system, precise 8px grid, all cards and controls use 8px radius, subtle editorial layout, not a marketing hero.
Color palette: use only motif-derived dusty mauve, muted hellebore green, warm cream, deep plum, winter-shade gray neutrals, and subtle editorial accents.
UI details: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search input, left navigation, dashboard charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, shadow scale, border/ring tokens, and a small botanical texture sample based on petal veining and plum speckles.
Text: use short readable UI labels and large section labels; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no saturated pink, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no other flower motif.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the "Morphous Hellebore" design-system board. It must feel like the same hellebore system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible hellebore cutout and the visible light design-system board as references. Preserve dusty mauve petals, deep plum freckles, muted hellebore green, warm cream stamens, winter-shade gray neutrals, petal veining, subtle editorial rhythm, 8px radius, and shadcn/tweakcn product UI language.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class composition, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Hellebore", Dark Mode, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Typography: readable English and Japanese examples; quiet editorial product UI with refined serif display accents and Noto Sans JP guidance.
Visual details: deep plum charcoal background, cream foreground, dusty mauve primary controls, muted sage green success/support, warm cream cards, winter gray borders, restrained contrast, subtle petal-vein texture overlays, crisp cards and controls with 8px radii.
UI details: left navigation/sidebar, top navigation tabs, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search input, dashboard charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, shadow scale, border/ring tokens, botanical texture samples.
Text: use short readable UI labels and large section labels; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no other flower motif.
